titleStmt.title: SII 5.647: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 647. (A.R. No. 87 of 1895). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumātar puviyenum perumātar Ivar tamā
teviyarkaḷāka nītiyuḷ nikaḻu nāḷinu ḷikal veṭṭeḻuntu ceṟ
ṟarumaṇik koppattu Āhavamallaṉnoṭu porjayam puriyuṅkā
lai Arunikart taṉ ṟiruttamaiyaṉākiya nil rājādhirā jan
muṉ nikalloṭu mikavantu � vicumpe
ṟṟi Antaravāḷat tarampaiya retirkoḷa Intiralokama meytiya
piṉpu kuntaḷar Āṭaṟppa kuṭaintu taṉ kaṭaṟppaṭai keṭakkaṇ ṭañcala
ñcaleṉ ṟaruḷit taṉ kuñcara meṟik kaṉṉāṭakarmeṟk kūṟṟeṉak kaṭāvit teri
kaṇai mutaliyar porupaṭai vaḻaṅki moympuyal caḷukki tampi jayaciṅkaṉum porp pu
laikkeciyum tārt tacapanma ṉum nanninuḷampaṉum Eṉu mivar mutaliyar Eṇṇili Arai
carai viṇṇakat teṟṟi Āyiṭai Etirnta kārcilai turanta ceñcaramāri taṉ kuñcara mukattiṉu
m taṉ ṟiruttuṭaiyiṉum kuṉṟuṟupuyattiṉum taākkavum taṉṉuṭaṉ kaḷuṟeṟiya
toṭukaḻal vīrar maṭiyavum vakaiyā torutani Anekam porupaṭai vaḻaṅki moympu
yal caḷukki taḷamikka veḻattai miṭal keṭa miṭṭuvittu Oṟṟarai veruvatturantuṟcayaṉ
maṟṟavaṉ taṟppaṭai pokaviṭṭu Appaka ṭiḻintu kula kulakulaiñcu talaimayir virittu miṉṉu
ṟa neḷittu pinnuṟa nokki vaṉṉiya revaṉum vaṉparaṭait tuttaṉum koṉnavil paṭai
k kuṇamayanum veṉṟa veñcina Araicaro ṭañci veruvi viḻit toṭa meṉkoṇṭāṉ kurumatirakara
pattiramutal porukaḷi ṟanekamum pariyaṟṟoṭiya kurutiyum Uriya teviyaraiyum varākavelkoṭi mu
tal rā japariccan=ta mum Enaiyanar peṟavum muṉaivaiyil koṇṭu porkkalaṉāta porkkalanākattup
pārttivarānon mun(n) ceytaṟiyātana pin nān ceytumen ṟeṇṇakkariyatu kaiykalantanṟinar paṭai ta
ṭarat tan ṟirumeniyil pacumpuṇmoḻi nir putampunalāla nikkinpol Akkaruṅkaḷattey vicai A
bhiṣe kam vicaimikac ceytu viraciṅkāsanan tirayaviṭṭup pontu kaṅkāpuri pukutaruḷina Inṟutoṟu
miyāvaruñ ceytaṟiyātana Ika(l)loḻukkan tontu tan ṟirukātalanāna Otalar taruṅkāl kaṅkaiko
ṇṭacoḻanaiyum Āṅkavan ṟirumakanāna Irunilaṅkāvalan Āḷavan=ta perumāṉaiyūm venṟikoḷ ta
n ṟiruttampiyar tammuḷ vanṟiṟal vaḷavan mummuṭicoḻanaiyum kaḷappaṭai viracoḻanaiyum vel
paṭai matūrānta kanaiyum pāraṇi tiraṭoḷ tan ṟirumakan rājentri coḻa naiyum tarāpati Irumuṭicoḻan rā
jādhi rājan curuti menkuṇaruñ coḻapāṇṭiyan vārcilait tānai
k karikālacoḻanenṟu coḻakaṅkan ṟoṭukaḻal Uttamacoḻane
nṟum cuṭarnaṟumaṇipunai tirumuṭi cūṭṭi tennavar mutaliyar ni
ruparait tāṅkavar Irunila māḷa nila mavarkkaruḷi kārkkaṭa lilaṅkai
yil porppaṭai naṭātti miṭarpaṭaik kaliṅkarman viracalāmekanai
k kataṟk kaḷirṟoṭum katirmuṭi taṭintu tanpin pontaiyil koppattu
vantaḻi caḷikki vanteytiya paripavam Innā kikalamar ceytu niṅkuvanne
nṟu cintaiyuḷ karuti Inpamaryin ninṟu tan pantamar pallirantalainin ṟuva
rkkaṭal kiḷan=ta tenap paṭai parappi van tu tonṟi Anṉār kalimuṭakkāṟ ṟamarpuriya vanta taṇṭa
nāyakan vālātevanum tiṇṭiṟal valliyarmutal pala paṭai Araicarum porkkaḷak kavi
ya Irukaiyar mutalinar mannavartammoṭu mentalan vikkalanoṭu tannālai yaḻintu caḷu
kki keṭṭuṭaitara maṇṭamar purintu tan taṇṭinmunpin cenṟorutani veḻamuṭaintuṭan noṭa
Āṅkavanai Irumaṭi menmen koṇṭaruḷip poruvaḻi māpperum pukaḻ mikavaḷak kopparake
caripanma rāna muṭaiyār śrīrājentrade varkku yāṇṭu 9 Āvatu Irājentri- ciṅkavaḷanā
ṭṭup poyikaināṭṭu de vatānan=ti rumaḻuvāṭi Uṭaiyāṟku cāttiyaruḷa mātevan virakeraḷan
Adhirājarāja muventaveḷān Iṭṭa mantri rapuṣpa māka ceyta poṟpū 1- ṉālpon 6 pa�m I
til naṭuvu nāyakanāka vaitta nilam 1- ṉā niṟai 7 � m Āka kalluṭpaṭa kuṭiñaikkallāl niṟai
67 � Itu māṭaikku Onpatarai māṟi Itukku kāṟaiyāka ceytiṭṭa takaṭu 1- ṉāl niṟai �
m Itu māṭaikku Onpatumāṟi kannapuṣpa māka Iṭṭa poṟpū 2- ṉālpon 10 1 pa Itu māṭaikku Araimāṟ
ṟun naṟuponnin mān=ta ḷirāka ceyta Itaṭakku 2 10 m naṭuvil moṭṭu 1 m Āka 2 10 5 2 10 1 ṉālpon
� Itu Onpatu māṟi Uṭaiyārkku tayirponakam Amutu ceytaruḷa Iṭṭa veḷḷik kaccuko
ram 1- ṉāl veḷḷi 48 pa cantanakkāppu cāttiyaruḷa Iṭṭa veḷḷi vaṭṭil 1 ṉāl veḷḷi 10 7 pa
tirumañcana māṭiyaruḷa Iṭṭa ceppukuṭam 1- ṉāl niṟai 2 10 5- l kaikkacu 2- cāṇa rai niḷattu tarāviḷakku
1 ṉā Uṭkaru Uṭpaṭa niṟai 100 l ponpūcina ceppumakuṭam 1 �10 2� Iṭṭa Uttariyam 1 pon� mu
ttuvaṭam 1 muttu 3 100 10 3 tuṟkaiyāṟku ceyta kāṟai 1 pon tirunāmam 1 pon �
�dakṣi ṇāmuttikaḷukku ceyta motiram kapon Uṭaiyār ṣrivirarājentra tevarkku
10 3 � ceyta paṭṭam 1 pon 10 1 pa� pon pūcina ceppu makuṭam 4�4 � Iṭṭapo
n � munpu kal veṭṭuppaṭi man=ti rapuṣpa māka ceyta poṟpūvil tacca takaṭu 1pon4 pa�m � Iṭṭup paṇṭārap pottakattu mutaluṇṭāy Itanoṭuṅ kūṭa ceyta poṟpū 1 pon �
Aḻiccu ceytu kotta kāṟai 1 6 pa7m� .
Digital edition of SII 5.647 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
